title: Soylent totem of undying
description:
Oh, umm, I'm playing some Minecraft, so i wanted to grab a Soylent.

I spend so much time in Minecraft that I don't leave my office for days
body:
Replaces the Totem of Undying with a lovely bottle of 'Soylent original' and adds an angelic chorus sound effect upon use!
